description: Post, delete & read on X (Twitter) using your own logged-in web session — no paid API.
name: io.github.nsozturk/tweetkit-x

environmentVariables.description: macOS Keychain service name holding your X session cookie string (must contain auth_token + ct0). Alternatively set TWEETKIT_COOKIE (the raw cookie string) or TWEETKIT_COOKIE_FILE (a file path).
environmentVariables.name: TWEETKIT_COOKIE_KEYCHAIN

environmentVariables.description: Your X (Twitter) session cookie string — the Cookie header from a logged-in x.com request. Must contain auth_token and ct0.
environmentVariables.name: TWEETKIT_COOKIE
